verses.1: Contend, LORD, with those who contend with me.
verses.2: Take hold of shield and buckler,
verses.3: Brandish the spear and block those who pursue me.
verses.4: Let those who seek after my soul be disappointed and brought to dishonor.
verses.5: Let them be as chaff before the wind,
verses.6: Let their way be dark and slippery,
verses.7: For without cause they have hidden their net in a pit for me.
verses.8: Let destruction come on him unawares.
verses.9: My soul shall be joyful in the LORD.
verses.10: All my bones shall say, “LORD, who is like you,
verses.12: They reward me evil for good,
verses.13: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth.
verses.14: I behaved myself as though it had been my friend or my brother.
verses.15: But in my adversity, they rejoiced, and gathered themselves together.
verses.16: Like the profane mockers in feasts,
verses.17: Lord, how long will you look on?
verses.18: I will give you thanks in the great assembly.
verses.19: Don’t let those who are my enemies wrongfully rejoice over me;
verses.21: Yes, they opened their mouth wide against me.
verses.22: You have seen it, LORD. Don’t keep silent.
verses.23: Wake up! Rise up to defend me, my God!
verses.24: Vindicate me, LORD my God, according to your righteousness.
verses.25: Don’t let them say in their heart, “Aha! That’s the way we want it!”
verses.26: Let them be disappointed and confounded together who rejoice at my calamity.
verses.27: Let those who favor my righteous cause shout for joy and be glad.
verses.28: My tongue shall talk about your righteousness and about your praise all day long.
